nasb.text: Do not deliver me over to the desire of my adversaries, For false witnesses have risen against me, And such as breathe out violence.

esv.text: Give me not up to the will of my adversaries; for false witnesses have risen against me, and they breathe out violence.

cnv.text: 求你不要照著我敵人的心願，把我交給他們， 因為有作假見證的人起來攻擊我， 並且口出兇暴的話。

ccb.text: 求你不要让仇敌抓到我， 遂其所愿， 因为他们诬告我，恐吓我。

csbs.text: 求你不要照着我敌人的愿望把我交出去， 因为作假见证并口吐凶言的起来攻击我。
